sourcePage.rawText:
11.    Which one of the following numbers is largest in value?
       (All angles are given in radians.)



       A       tan

       B       log   100

       C       sin

       D       log 10

       E        √2 − 1

stem.rawText:
Which one of the following numbers is largest in value?
       (All angles are given in radians.)

solution.rawText:
We work out or approximate all five numbers.

A tan 3π
         
       4 = −1

B log10 100 = 2

C sin10 π2 = 110 = 1
          

D log2 10 = 3. · · · , or more formally, 3 < log2 10 < 4, as 23 = 8 and 24 = 16
       √                       √
E 0 < 2 − 1 < 1, so 0 < ( 2 − 1)10 < 1

Only one of these numbers is greater than 3, so the answer is D.
